subject: Re: Clarifying Binning
body:
Play with CTF settings:
- Starting fit at 30Å (in older Warp version the number to put in is 2 x pixel size/30).
- Play with ctf size 256 or 512.
- Play with summed image.

Wim

> On 30. Aug 2019, at 16:29, Farzad Hamdi <farzaad@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> Hi All,
> 
> I am using the warp for Falcon 3 without superresolution or binning. I understood that the binning is the binary log of the number of the binned pixels: so I guess I must use bin=0 when I do not bin my data or use superresolution mode. But when I set Bin:=0 the software fails to fit CTF correctly in most cases. It is while I can clearly see the Thon-rings. Is my understanding about the bin parameter wrong?
> 
> Regards
> 
> Farzad
> --
